statusLine.command: input=$(cat); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); total_in=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_out=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); cost=$(echo "scale=4; ($total_in * 3 + $total_out * 15) / 1000000" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo '0'); if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf "Context: %.1f%% used | Cost: \$%.4f" "$used" "$cost"; else printf "Cost: \$%.4f" "$cost"; fi
